root_text.an5.22:1.1: “So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu agāravo appatisso asabhāgavuttiko ‘sabrahmacārīsu ābhisamācārikaṁ dhammaṁ paripūressatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.22:1.2: ‘Ābhisamācārikaṁ dhammaṁ aparipūretvā sekhaṁ dhammaṁ paripūressatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.22:1.3: ‘Sekhaṁ dhammaṁ aparipūretvā sīlakkhandhaṁ paripūressatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.22:1.4: ‘Sīlakkhandhaṁ aparipūretvā samādhikkhandhaṁ paripūressatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.22:1.5: ‘Samādhikkhandhaṁ aparipūretvā paññākkhandhaṁ paripūressatī’ti netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.22:2.1: So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sagāravo sappatisso sabhāgavuttiko ‘sabrahmacārīsu ābhisamācārikaṁ dhammaṁ paripūressatī’ti ṭhānametaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.22:2.2: ‘Ābhisamācārikaṁ dhammaṁ paripūretvā sekhaṁ dhammaṁ paripūressatī’ti ṭhānametaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an5.22:2.3: ‘Sekhaṁ dhammaṁ paripūretvā sīlakkhandhaṁ paripūressatī’ti ṭhānametaṁ vijjati.

translation_text.an5.22:1.1: “Mendicants, it is quite impossible for a disrespectful and irreverent mendicant with incompatible lifestyle to fulfill the practice dealing with supplementary regulations regarding their spiritual companions.
translation_text.an5.22:1.2: Without fulfilling the practice dealing with supplementary regulations, it’s impossible to fulfill the practice of a trainee.
translation_text.an5.22:1.3: Without fulfilling the practice of a trainee, it’s impossible to fulfill the entire spectrum of ethics.
translation_text.an5.22:1.4: Without fulfilling the entire spectrum of ethics, it’s impossible to fulfill the entire spectrum of immersion.
translation_text.an5.22:1.5: Without fulfilling the entire spectrum of immersion, it’s impossible to fulfill the entire spectrum of wisdom.
translation_text.an5.22:2.1: But it is quite possible for a respectful and reverent mendicant with compatible lifestyle to fulfill the practice dealing with supplementary regulations regarding their spiritual companions.
translation_text.an5.22:2.2: Having fulfilled the practice dealing with supplementary regulations, it’s possible to fulfill the practice of a trainee.
translation_text.an5.22:2.3: Having fulfilled the practice of a trainee, it’s possible to fulfill the entire spectrum of ethics.
translation_text.an5.22:2.4: Having fulfilled the entire spectrum of ethics, it’s possible to fulfill the entire spectrum of immersion.
translation_text.an5.22:2.5: Having fulfilled the entire spectrum of immersion, it’s possible to fulfill the entire spectrum of wisdom.”
